entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,696Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 97

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Lost to All But Time
entry.summary:
Author: a_written_simulacra

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,041Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 45

Summary: Merlin has waited beside the lake for over 1,500 years, and when he finally gets a visitor, it's not Arthur Pendragon--but an eccentric English man who arrives in a blue telephone box, calls himself the Doctor, and claims that not only is time travel real, but it's absolutely imperative that Merlin go back in time with him--back to the age of Camelot where Prince Arthur is very much alive.

entry.title: close to you
entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,525Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 82

Summary: In the months since Arthur became king, he has repealed the ban on magic, appointed Merlin as his Court Sorcerer, and made peace with the Druids. The Golden Age of Albion must surely be at hand—if only he and Merlin could stop arguing long enough to enjoy it. Or: Merlin and Arthur fall foul of a proximity curse. What could possibly go wrong? Written for Merthur Glompfest 2026.

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,602Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 85

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.summary:
Author: Jockles

entry.title: His Majesty My King
entry.summary:
Author: Bollsye

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,398Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 78

Summary: Arthur’s hand clenched into a fist, his entire body coiled like a drawn blade. Water dripped steadily from his armor, pooling at his feet, but he stood tall despite it every inch a king, the people could feel it in his energy.But his eyesHis eyes betrayed him.Confusion. Disbelief. The dawning realization that nothing before him made sense.The lake behind him was calm.Too calm.As if it had never held him at all.Arthur swallowed hard, his voice lower now, edged with something far more uncertain.“…Merlin?”No one answered.And the crowd only grew. ---------------------------* Or Arthur has finally returned and English is hard

entry.title: Whispers of to a Love he feared to loose
entry.summary:
Author: KeeperOfDragons

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,246Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: You didn't know what to say, when he gave you that sigil. Whispering so gently to you as he gave you that gift. He might think you are a fool, but you knew what it meant, or at least what it was supposed to mean. Or Merthur microfic prompt: Whisper + Merlin Bingo Fill: Writing format: Second Person Point of View

entry.title: The teenager you never got to be
entry.summary:
Author: AriasAstro

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,785Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 59

Summary: Mordred never meant to be knighted while being a teenager. It just sort of, happened. Yes, it was against the law to be a knight and be under 18 summers old, but that wasn't Mordred's fault. On top of that, Mordred was much more than a simple 15 year old. With Morgana back in Camelot and everyone happier, Mordred can't help but think something will happen. And, something does in fact happen. After an incident in training, everyone finds out about Mordred's true age. After that, the people around Mordred find out more and more about how much Mordred has truly been hiding from them. Things that all of them wished they could fix. Or The knights of Camelot (+merlin) find out that Mordred is not even 16 years old. They are not amused. Now, Mordred is being treated like a child by everyone around him. But after he's been through... maybe it's for the best?

entry.title: The Hidden Immortals
entry.summary:
Author: SyphontheNightFury

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 393Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Something was wrong. The world was crying, Magic was screaming, the very essence of Life itself calling for it's Champion, it's Saviour. And they answered. The shockwaves of That Night were felt worldwide, setting events in motion which could not be stopped, even if the hidden Dark Lord tried...

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,611Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Dreams of Drowning (All I Wanted Was You)
entry.summary:
Author: AA_BATTERY479

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,764Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: ...“You shouldn’t be here…’s not safe.”Merlin doesn’t stop, either not hearing him or ignoring the warning. Probably the latter.He crosses in front of him, and Arthur notices that his shirt is splattered with blood. “You’re bleeding,” Arthur whispers.Merlin continues. “It’s not my blood, don’t worry.”Arthur’s brain tries to make sense of that statement, fails, and promptly moves on.Merlin huffs in satisfaction when the last of the chains are removed. With nothing holding him up, Arthur slumps forward and falls into him, and Merlin lets out a little “oof” as he struggles with the sudden weight.I love you, Arthur thinks, as Merlin grunts and lifts him up, throwing his arm around his shoulder, somehow lifting his full weight. I love you. Merlin's blurry face swims above him, glancing down at Arthur every few seconds in concern, trying to figure out a plan to get out of here with Arthur's depleted strength. I love you. I love you. I love you...

entry.title: willow (Arthur's Version)
entry.summary:
Author: mittwoch

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 894Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: Arthur tries to understand how Merlin has magic. Merlin, his dopey, loyal, manservant, of whom he considered his best friend has magic. How could he keep that from Arthur all this time?At least the thoughts distract him from the awful pain festering from his stab wound.---This story follows Arthur coming to terms with his feelings for Merlin.

entry.title: Beast Like Me
entry.summary:
Author: lindenwaverly

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,565Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 50

Summary: The man was beautiful. Hair as gold as dawn sunlight, eyes like the endless blue depths of a midsummer afternoon. His face was a marble angel’s, the lines of brow and cheek and jaw almost too mathematically perfect. Every good sculptor always knew to put in a flaw. His was in his front teeth, just a little too large, and it made Merlin dig his fingernails into his palms. He was lithe, muscular, dressed in black. Half-dressed - his jerkin was unbuttoned, his shirt open nearly to his navel, and he was missing a sock. His hair had the raked-through look of a man in crisis. His smile was dazzling and mad. “This,” he said, spreading his hands, “is the magnificent - nay, the opulent court of the Crown Prince of Camelot!” And then, very pleasantly - “Gaius, what the fuck is this?” OR - When Merlin goes to find Gaius, he's told that he's left Camelot. Tracing his would-be mentor, Merlin finds himself at a tumbledown castle on the edge of a hill. There are chickens, radishes, a knight who'd much rather focus on his squash and a strange voice calling in the night. And a secret hidden in the heart of Castle Perilous. The secret behind the most important rule: don't bleed.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock & The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,443Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century. Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Cursed Love
entry.summary:
Author: Nukagirl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,117Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 37

Summary: “I am just about to go get your dinner,” Merlin said, not looking up from his current job, “I’m a bit behind as I was helping Gwen earlier.”Arthur didn’t respond but he walked over to Merlin. Merlin looked up as Arthur was upon him, a look of fury in his eyes. It was too late for Merlin to move as Arthur shoved him back. The armour fell to the ground as Merlin stumbled backwards.“Wha-?” Merlin started to ask but was cut off as Arthur slapped him across the face, his eyes red with anger. Merlin backed away, his hand on his burning cheek, confusion and hurt in his eyes.xArthur has been cursed but the only one that realises is Merlin. Now, he just needs to work out how to break it before Arthur kills him

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Loyalty As A Knife
entry.summary:
Author: Buttercup_ghost

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,670Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: The first thing he ever saw in Camelot was an execution. There has never been a man as loyal as Merlin. That, actually, is the problem. (A Merlin rewrite; Merlin’s POV.)

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,495Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 36

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
